conversionFunctions.trackAddToCart: function trackAddToCart(variantId, variantName, price) { dataLayer.push({'event': 'add_to_cart', 'ecommerce': {'currency': 'INR', 'value': price, 'items': [{'item_id': variantId, 'item_name': variantName, 'item_brand': 'Pinnacle Therapy Materials', 'item_category': 'Sensory Regulation', 'price': price, 'quantity': 1}]}}); fbq('track', 'AddToCart', {content_ids: [variantId], content_name: variantName, content_type: 'product', value: price, currency: 'INR'}); if(typeof lintrk !== 'undefined') lintrk('track', { conversion_id: 'ADD_TO_CART_CONVERSION_ID' }); }
conversionFunctions.trackPurchase: function trackPurchase(transactionId, value, items) { dataLayer.push({'event': 'purchase', 'ecommerce': {'transaction_id': transactionId, 'value': value, 'currency': 'INR', 'items': items}}); fbq('track', 'Purchase', {value: value, currency: 'INR', content_ids: items.map(i => i.item_id), content_type: 'product'}); if(typeof lintrk !== 'undefined') lintrk('track', { conversion_id: 'PURCHASE_CONVERSION_ID' }); }
conversionFunctions.trackLead: function trackLead(leadType) { dataLayer.push({'event': 'generate_lead', 'lead_type': leadType, 'currency': 'INR', 'value': 500}); fbq('track', 'Lead', {content_category: leadType}); if(typeof lintrk !== 'undefined') lintrk('track', { conversion_id: 'LEAD_CONVERSION_ID' }); }
conversionFunctions.trackAppDownload: function trackAppDownload(platform) { dataLayer.push({'event': 'app_download', 'app_platform': platform, 'app_name': 'Pinnacle Blooms Network'}); fbq('track', 'CompleteRegistration', {content_name: 'App Download', status: platform}); }
conversionFunctions.trackVideoPlay: function trackVideoPlay(videoTitle, duration) { dataLayer.push({'event': 'video_start', 'video_title': videoTitle, 'video_duration': duration}); fbq('track', 'ViewContent', {content_name: videoTitle, content_type: 'video'}); }

engagementTracking.scrollDepth: var scrollTracked = {}; window.addEventListener('scroll', function() { var scrollPercent = Math.round((window.scrollY / (document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight)) * 100); [25, 50, 75, 90, 100].forEach(function(threshold) { if (scrollPercent >= threshold && !scrollTracked[threshold]) { scrollTracked[threshold] = true; dataLayer.push({'event': 'scroll_depth', 'scroll_threshold': threshold, 'page_path': window.location.pathname}); } }); });
engagementTracking.timeOnPage: var pageLoadTime = Date.now(); window.addEventListener('beforeunload', function() { var timeOnPage = Math.round((Date.now() - pageLoadTime) / 1000); dataLayer.push({'event': 'time_on_page', 'engagement_time': timeOnPage}); });
